programme.desc: Bender becomes a paparazzi and tries to photograph an actor whose face as never been seen before.

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos
programme.desc: When the boys fire Butters as their new friend, devastation over his rejection unleashes his dark side and the super villain Professor Chaos is born.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The kids desperately want to bring an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.

programme.title: South Park: The Tale of Scrotie McBoogerballs
programme.desc: The boys are given a controversial book to read in school and it inspires them to write one of their own. They convince Butters to take credit for the filth that they have written, but become jealous when he is hailed as a literary genius.

programme.title: South Park: Faith Hilling
programme.desc: The kids are in danger when new trends start to evolve and shift at a rapid pace.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium Isn't Free
programme.desc: Stan is addicted to the new Terrance and Phillip mobile game.

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: The boys must embrace the latest fad to hit South Park Elementary or risk their status as the coolest kids in school.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.title: South Park: Bass to Mouth
programme.desc: The kids' most scandalous secrets are being leaked on an outrageous new gossip website.

programme.title: South Park: Over Logging
programme.desc: One day the citizens of South Park wake up and find the Internet is gone. When Randy hears there may still be some Internet out in California, he packs up his family and heads west.

programme.title: South Park: More Crap
programme.desc: Stan's dad Randy becomes South Park's hometown hero when the guys down at the local bar see the size of his most recent crap. Drunk with his new-found fame, Randy attempts to break a world set by Bono.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go
programme.desc: Things go horribly wrong when Cartman plans to propel himself into the future. South Park Elementary School is facing strong opposition to the topic of evolution being taught to the fourth graders, especially from Mr. Garrison who must teach it.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: Movie: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: When their sons begin having play dates, moms Stephanie and Emily find themselves also becoming friends with each other, but when the glamorous Stephanie goes missing, vlogger Stephanie tries to uncover the truth behind her sudden disappearance.

programme.title: Movie: My Husband's Killer Girlfriend
programme.desc: A mother discovers that the nanny who framed her for abandoning her 3-year-old daughter is her ex-husband's new girlfriend, but no one believes her version of events.

programme.title: Movie: How I Met Your Murderer
programme.desc: The host of a wildly successful true crime podcast finds herself the center of the story after learning her husband was involved in the death of his high school sweetheart.

programme.title: Movie: Galentine's Day Nightmare

programme.desc: Christina presses Owen to confess the details of his affair. Meanwhile, Mark takes his new authority very seriously when he steps in as chief for the day and butts heads with Richard over a patient's live transplant.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Girl With No Name
programme.desc: The doctors work on a Jane Doe, who turns out to be the subject of a case that gained national interest; Cristina proves to be the highest in demand as the residents begin their interviews for post-residency positions at prospective hospitals.

programme.title: The Closer: Strike Three
programme.desc: A major shootout leaves two patrol cops and an 18-year-old neo-Nazi dead. The investigation is made more difficult by the involvement of Capt. Sharon Raydor of Force Investigation Division.

programme.title: The Closer: Elysian Fields
programme.desc: The squad investigates the murder of a man who, 10 years ago, was the lead suspect in the murder of two girls. The state of the body indicates he was dragged behind a truck a full day before being shot twice in the head and dumped in Elysian Park.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Shame Game
programme.desc: Major Crimes struggles to keep important documents from leaking. A situation proves extremely uncomfortable for Capt. Raydor, when the Department of Children and Family Services tracks down Rusty's biological father.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dismissed With Prejudice
programme.desc: When a murder conviction is overturned after eight years, Tao is forced to question his past actions. Meanwhile, Rusty struggles to be himself during his first outing with his father.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cheaters Never Prosper
programme.desc: A man from Las Vegas is found dead after an apparent overdose but the facts become unclear as details begin to unfold. Meanwhile, a series of strange events leave Rusty and Raydor wondering if Dunn can be trusted.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Long Shot
programme.desc: When a peaceful ceremony turns deadly, Major Crimes and the FBI team up to track down a dangerous sniper. Meanwhile, Raydor negotiates a deal that even Provenza can get behind.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Final Cut
programme.desc: The squad scrambles to garner a confession when the pregnant wife of a film director is found murdered. Meanwhile, just as things seem to fall into place under Raydor's leadership, new Deputy D.A. challenges Raydor's intentions as Rusty's guardian.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hunting Human Beings Part 1
programme.desc: After a 40-year manhunt, investigators finally find their needle in a DNA haystack and unmask a man who they suspect as California’s most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hiding in Plain Sight Part 2
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Now accused of committing some of California’s most heinous crimes, this man was hiding in plain sight.

programme.desc: Rust-ridden Caddy dumped, Richard gambles that the GMG crew can recoup his losses with a '60 Bel Air. Christie talks money: first with a dad who wants to punk his teenage son with a Yugo and then with Richard trying to convince him to hire his sister.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Shelby Rent-A-Racer Resto, Part II
programme.desc: Engine issues plague the '68 Shelby. Richard flips the rare '66 Lotus Cortina and floating Amphicar for some fast cash. A classic Ford Falcon arrives at the garage and selling it would be icing on the cake.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Holy Grail Firebirds, Part II
programme.desc: With a 10K-a-day penalty looming, Richard can't afford to lose any more time on the two Firebirds' concourse restoration, but by the end of the project, the garage will be short two Monkeys. Richard flips a '49 Mercury that comes complete with passenger.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped and Dropped Model A, Part II

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Super Sonic Camero, Part II

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Big, Bad C-10 Build, Part II
programme.desc: The plan to build Gas Monkey's coolest show truck continues as Richard hopes to deliver a 1976 Chevy C-10 to the Cattle Baron's Ball. Meanwhile, Richard tries to flip a '66 Continental and a '51 Caddy. Also, Richard stops by Fired Up to check on the rent.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: NHRA and a '55 Pink Caddy, Part II
programme.desc: After a constant wait for parts for the '55 Pink Caddy, the monkeys make a mad dash to get the car done on time. Meanwhile, Richard ventures into new territory as his Gas Monkey Dragster hits the Texas Motorplex for the NHRA qualifying runs.

programme.desc: Ethan is left speechless after Olivia gets a body piercing. Ethan and Olivia host Micah and Moriah for their first ever Independence Day. Kim, Barry and the kids head back to the farm to welcome visitors from down under.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hollywood
programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as receptionists in a waiting room. Later, a road trip will drive tonight's big loser to the brink of insanity.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bleach for America
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr play receptionist for the day and then teach parents proper home-schooling techniques. One joker lands the endorsement deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: GaTa
programme.desc: GaTa tasks the three chefs with recreating Domino's Hawaiian Pizza.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale
programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: Find out which bizarre character wound up on the IJ cruise, which Joker once had to put a stranger's hand in his mouth, and which challenge was filmed in a basement. Plus, learn what punishment almost involved pantsing a CEO.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Closer
programme.desc: Learn which challenges Murr's considers his favorite, who has an impressive sneaker collection and why the crew was on high alert during this punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Halloween Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a Halloween-themed party and surprise each other with elaborate costumes. They're joined by Kane Hodder, aka Jason Voorhees.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Backyard Cookout Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a late-summer cookout featuring the real star of the Impractical Jokers Movie: Paula Abdul.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: All Flubbed Up
programme.desc: Watch a woman with seemingly magical powers disrupt an ordinary coffee shop.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: You've Got Fail
programme.desc: Find out why a boy regrets his first kiss.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Comical Fools
programme.desc: Learn why playing with fire is still a bad idea, see who has the fastest Rubik's Cube hands underwater, and the latest on the dad bod craze that's taking over the world.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Pranks and Funny Fails
programme.desc: Find out what happens when you get caught in a no-selfie zone, why mailing humans is the way of the future, and how cuddling is an art form of its own.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Giving

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cars
programme.desc: Adam dives into the much-beloved auto industry and exposes the surprising truths behind car dealerships, and the fact that the concept of jaywalking was created by auto manufacturers to blame pedestrians for car crashes.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Restaurants
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the hidden truths of dining out. He explains why tipping is a custom worth ditching, shows that experts can't tell the difference between wines and reveals that mislabeled seafood is rampant in the industry.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The guys freeze out skaters at an ice rink's rental counter, and head to the mall where they have the audacity to ask strangers to mind their manners. Then, tonight's loser is down for the count after donning a diaper for a sumo-sized punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q freak out a focus group by reading ridiculous answers, and then participate in a thrilling toilet paper shootout in their favourite market. Plus, the loser’s fancy dinner party turns into the messiest ride of his life.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Just Made History
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Michael poses as a hipster at a farmers' market and makes an endless supply of juice. Then, things become blurry at the eye doctor, and later, shape-shifting aliens send Michael's co-worker into a frenzy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dangerously Drinkable
programme.desc: Michael astounds dental patients with molar radio transmissions, and while appraising art, he brings an extinct species back to life. Plus, an unusual brew stirs a ghostly hallucination that will make jaws drop.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Japanese Waterless Folding Toilet
programme.desc: Michael stretches headphone cords and reality with a mystical putty, stuns a co-worker with new bathroom technology, and in the big finale, a Porta Potty becomes a Portal Potty, leaving a construction worker amazed.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Albino Corn Snake Viper Patrol
programme.desc: Working at a tattoo parlor, Michael gets some killer ink in a flash. Later, a serpent ambushes a routine car checkup and one unlucky guy learns a lesson in shrinkage down on the docks.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 6

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 13
programme.desc: Watch 20 of the wildest, most pointless brawls every captured on film. You'll see a vicious slap fight, a seriously low blow, and some amazing girl on girl on girl action.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 23
programme.desc: Subjects include a woman who dials 911 with an urgent request for a husband and a robber who wraps his face in toilet paper but leaves behind prescription drugs with his name on the bottle.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 24

programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: When Rob and Chyna get into an explosive fight, the girls rally behind them with hopes that they can fix their relationship. Meanwhile, the family tries to convince Khloé to break her streak of bad birthdays.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Khloé's New Breast Friends
programme.desc: Kim finds herself in a major ordeal when she unknowingly upsets her mom after helping Cait get ready for the ESPY awards. Meanwhile, Khloé tests out life with bigger breasts, and Scott searches for a healthy way to keep himself occupied.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord Disick Returns
programme.desc: The family heads to San Diego for MJ's birthday, but Rob bails and goes missing after a fight with Chyna. Meanwhile, Scott goes to great lengths to resurrect the Lord after much prodding from the family, and Kim struggles with doing North's hair.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord of the Cougars
programme.desc: Kendall suffers from sleep paralysis, which threatens her work and travel life. Meanwhile, Kim searches for methods to control her anxiety and Scott develops an unlikely friendship with Kris and her girlfriends.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Controversies and Legacies
programme.desc: Kim's decision to try for a third child proves to be a matter of life and death. Meanwhile Kendall fears backlash from supporting stricter gun control, and Kris gets emotional upon recognizing her mom won't be around forever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Good Deeds
programme.desc: With Rob's baby only a month away, the family is excited to celebrate and go all out to plan a baby shower for the couple, but, when Rob and Chyna get into a fight, the party is ruined.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Time to Dash
programme.desc: During a trip to Miami, a major department store makes an offer to buy Dash that leads to Kim, Kourtney, and Khloé arguing about the store's future. Later, Kourtney struggles to enjoy herself around Scott and Khloé keeps her new relationship from Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Last Ditch Effort
programme.desc: Kim undergoes one final procedure on her uterus in an attempt to carry another baby, but suffers from dangerous complications. Meanwhile, Khloe worries that if her new denim line does not meet its high sales expectations.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part One)
programme.desc: Kim begins to ease back into her public life, but is blindsided by some upsetting news about Kanye. Meanwhile, Khloé is pressured to mend her relationship with Cait, the family speculate over Kourtney and Scott, and Rob welcomes his first baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part Two)
programme.desc: After receiving some troubling news about Kanye while in New York for the Angel Ball, Kim rushes home to his aid. Meanwhile, Kendall worries that a bad review could jeopardize her modeling career, and Khloé clashes with Malika over priorities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex Files
programme.desc: After an explosive fight between Rob and Chyna, the sisters feel like it is their duty to protect their brother from a toxic relationship. Meanwhile, Kris tries to rebuild her relationship with Cait, but is blindsided by some hurtful allegations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Scott is devastated when he hears a rumor that Kourtney is hooking up with another guy and spirals back into old vices. After taking some personal time following the robbery, Kim is back to work but is reluctant to be in the public eye anymore.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Trippin' Part One
programme.desc: After Kim busts Scott with a girl in Dubai, the family is surprised Kourtney allowed him on the family trip to Costa Rica. The sisters discover Scott has invited yet another girl to join him in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast Cruisin'
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's cruising the East Coast, grabbin' delicious dishes at classic joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hearty Home Cookin'

programme.desc: This trip, Guy's crossing the states to get some south of the border flavor. From Florida to California, Southwest to Midwest, he's diving into everything from tacos, tamales and tortas to al pastor and pozole. Plus, fiery burritos and seafood sensations.

programme.title: Movie: Seed of Chucky
programme.desc: Chucky's son brings his parents back to life, and is shocked by their violent ways.

programme.title: Movie: The Circle
programme.desc: A young woman takes the opportunity of a lifetime to work at the world's most powerful technology company. When she joins a ground-breaking experiment, she finds it pushes the boundaries of privacy and ethics, and will affect the lives of everyone.

programme.title: Movie: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: A teenage human-vampire hybrid trains at a special school to protect the Moroi: a line of peaceful, mortal vampires, of which her best friend is one. Aware of a growing threat within the Academy, the two plan to make their escape.

programme.title: Movie: Drive Angry
programme.desc: A father escapes from hell to hunt down the man who killed his daughter and abducted his granddaughter.

programme.title: Home Town: A Second Chance
programme.desc: When a tornado rips through Laurel, the home Ben and Erin renovated for Nancy and Richard T Jones is severely damaged. They vow to not only restore it to its pre-tornado condition, but to re-imagine it.

programme.title: Home Town: A Laurel Hug
programme.desc: A woman is moving back to Laurel to be close to family after the sudden passing of her husband. Ben and Erin thoughtfully bring their design to life and create a gorgeous, sun-filled home as a soft landing to help get her through this difficult time.

programme.title: Home Town: Grand Style
programme.desc: A woman moving back to Laurel after being away for years wants a place big enough to accommodate her parents, kids and grandkids if they visit all at once. Erin can't wait to deliver on her ideal design plan: blue and white in the French provincial style.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: First Hammer Swing
programme.desc: Ben and Erin begin revitalizing a small town by turning a foster couple's home into a welcoming space for kids. Dave and Jenny Marrs join in to help them tackle a boutique on the brink of closure, and a special guest surprises Wetumpka with a performance.

programme.title: Home Town: Memory Lane: Town or Country
programme.desc: David and Taneia own a number of rental properties in Laurel and need Ben and Erin's help to help them choose which one will meet their needs as they enter their empty nester phase.

programme.title: Home Town: A Southern Dream
programme.desc: A woman inherits her mom's house after she passes away, but it's far too small for her growing family. Ben and Erin come up with an ambitious plan to double the size of the house, adding a master suite and two additional bedrooms upstairs.

programme.title: $50K Three Ways: Breaking Bland
programme.desc: A couple's beautiful Craftsman house in Chicago is so crammed with kids' toys they can barely move. After being too overwhelmed to even hang up art, Tiffany Brooks shows them how to break their style paralysis with three life-changing renovation options.

programme.title: Home Town: Banquette Dreams
programme.desc: Virginia newlyweds look for a new place to call home in Mississippi. They have an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a banquette, a master bedroom and a spacious front porch.

programme.title: Home Town: An Island for All
programme.desc: A long-time local teacher looks for a house where she can entertain her large family. She has an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a large kitchen and family living area to host her big family get-togethers.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: The Toilet Is Still in the Hallway
programme.desc: Armed with some previous construction experience, a man convinced his partner he could tackle their remodeling projects. Three months later, however, the work is not complete. Jasmine rescues them by finishing their bathroom and updating their kitchen.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Behind the Tarp
programme.desc: A handyman set out to give his wife the luxurious bathroom she has always wanted. However, now they are in over their heads and living in a construction zone.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Time to Hand It Over to the Pros
programme.desc: A couple with demanding jobs took on projects around their home, but now they have no time to finish all the work. Jasmine finishes their floors, updates their kitchen and tackles their backyard to create spaces where they can reconnect after a long day.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Four Weeks Until Baby
programme.desc: A couple's renovation dreams were dashed when they were forced to spend their budget on mold issues after moving. Now they have a baby on the way, and Jasmine has four weeks to renovate their kitchen, dining room and give them a much-needed nursery.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: I Don't Want to be Project Manager Anymore
programme.desc: A couple set out to create their dream home, but their skill level ran out and they have a million projects they can't finish. Jasmine steps in to turn their half-finished kitchen, bathroom and backyard into spaces where the family can relax and connect.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Can You Believe I'm Living Here?
programme.desc: After taking a huge chunk off their 1960s fixer upper, a couple is living with a gutted living room and kitchen with no plans on how to fix the demolition. Jasmine works with their dwindling budget to create a stunning beach house retreat.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Split-level Struggle
programme.desc: Before a couple can buy their dream home, they must sell their outdated split level, and they're having trouble getting buyers in the door. Lyndsay and Leslie bring the home up to date with sleek, modern touches and minimalist elements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Lake House Update
programme.desc: A woman who cares for her ailing father is struggling to sell her home in a desirable neighborhood. Leslie and Lyndsay jump at the opportunity to transform the outdated property into an industrial-chic showstopper that's perfect for a high-end buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Empty Nest Turned Family Retreat
programme.desc: A dad and his two adult daughters are ready to move on in life, but they're struggling to sell their family home. Leslie and Lyndsay work to transform their dated, 1990s property into a coastal retreat that will attract a brand-new family.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Starter Home Transformation
programme.desc: A sister who is trying to help sell her brother's property has had no luck finding a buyer. Lyndsay and Leslie come to the rescue by updating the small starter home with Scandinavian design elements and an outdoor oasis that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Two-Bedroom Dilemma
programme.desc: Siblings struggling to sell their sister's home need Lyndsay and Leslie's expertise. The twins redefine the dated two-bedroom rambler into a modern three-bedroom farmhouse with a deck that will be enjoyed even on a rainy Pacific Northwestern day.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Keeping the Character
programme.desc: A young couple having trouble selling their older home ask Lyndsay and Leslie for help. The twins are challenged to keep the house's cozy character and add more charm to an aging property that's seen years of mish-mashed styles.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Mid-Mod Oasis
programme.desc: A homeowner seeks Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell her inconsistently styled midcentury modern house. By decking out a dreamy backyard oasis and trimming trees to show off the water and mountain vista, the twins clear the way for a high sales price.

programme.title: My Paranormal Nightmare: Scarred

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Reunion Part One

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Possessed by an Alien
programme.desc: When footage reveals a man's leg taking on a life of its own, it appears that something alien is trying to burst free; cutting-edge science investigates what explains this strange and sinister possession, and what it takes to exorcise the invader inside.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Revenge of the Monster Wolf
programme.desc: Footage of a fearsome wolf-like creature in the remote wilderness of northern Canada could be evidence of a dire wolf, a prehistoric beast that went extinct at the end of the last Ice Age; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if it has returned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Persia
programme.desc: The sprawling city of Persepolis was capital to the first imperial civilization that conquered most of the known ancient world; now, experts use advanced forensic archaeology to reveal the secrets behind Persia's mysterious and dominating metropolis.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Legend of Machu Picchu
programme.desc: Machu Picchu is one of the greatest landmarks of world architecture, yet the purpose of its construction and how it was built still remains a mystery; experts use cutting-edge engineering to reveal what it would take to rebuild this legendary city.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Persia
programme.desc: The sprawling city of Persepolis was capital to the first imperial civilization that conquered most of the known ancient world; now, experts use advanced forensic archaeology to reveal the secrets behind Persia's mysterious and dominating metropolis.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Revenge of the Monster Wolf
programme.desc: Footage of a fearsome wolf-like creature in the remote wilderness of northern Canada could be evidence of a dire wolf, a prehistoric beast that went extinct at the end of the last Ice Age; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if it has returned.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: Heist!
programme.desc: International hackers, an aviation-savvy hijacker and a gang of bank-robbing granddads mount some of the world's most daring and ingenious heists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Alien Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, human-sized egg floating in Arctic waters, some experts wonder if it's evidence of alien life; using cutting-edge technology, investigators try to reveal the true origins of this unexplained discovery.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Almost Home
programme.desc: Gayle Isleib was shot on April 30, 1996. Police identify a co-worker, Tyronne Montgomery. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap Gayle, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. Tyrone Montgomery was convicted of 1st degree Murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Flowers in the Lake
programme.desc: Leesa Nascimento was murdered on July 6, 2010 by being shot in the head. A recently sacked co-worker, Lorenza Sam is traced after evidence was found that tied him to the murder and he was arrested. He was sentenced to Life in Prison without parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Fatal Fraud
programme.desc: In Scottsdale, Arizona, single mom Tammy Lovell pays the ultimate price after she forces her boyfriend to confess to police his role in an insurance fraud scheme. Little does she realize; this good deed will soon cause her family's destruction.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: Timothy Bass had gotten away with murder for decades, telling his wife, Gina, that he enjoyed working the night shift to make extra money. For years, Gina believed him until she uncovered his secret and was left wondering what evil her husband had done.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Box On Her Doorstep
programme.desc: Each time she was targeted by an anonymous predator, Sarah Garone ran to her stepfather, Gary Hardy. She always felt something about Gary was creepy, but as the events got more disturbing, she never imagined someone trusted could be the one to hurt her.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Clearing the Docket
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a walk to the store on a cold winter night. The next morning police find her lifeless body in a snowbank six miles away.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Brand New Dress
programme.desc: An argument among sisters over a new dress leads a young girl to leave her house to calm down. But when she never returns, the desperate search to find her begins.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Box On Her Doorstep
programme.desc: Each time she was targeted by an anonymous predator, Sarah Garone ran to her stepfather, Gary Hardy. She always felt something about Gary was creepy, but as the events got more disturbing, she never imagined someone trusted could be the one to hurt her.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Clearing the Docket
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a walk to the store on a cold winter night. The next morning police find her lifeless body in a snowbank six miles away.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Officer Down
programme.desc: A beloved detective is killed during a shootout in at a downtown Atlanta hotel. His fellow officers, and his own son, work hard to bring the shooters to justice.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Some Like It Dead
programme.desc: When Mirinda marries Sam, everyone is happy. She's pretty, he's cute and friendly. Until her spending veers out of control, tearing the couple apart. As the two fight it out, one of them looks outside the marriage - and finds nothing short of murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanya Buschman is just getting out of a nasty marriage when she falls for handsome Michel Bérubé, a bartender in Montreal. But it's not long before jealousy becomes foreplay for a suspicious suicide that has friends pointing fingers at friends.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hells Bells
programme.desc: Rhonda Smith is a beautiful, single woman who relies on the kindness of strangers at her new church to make her way in the world - until one of them strays from the path of righteousness and betrays her.

programme.title: Shattered: Mother's Little Helpers
programme.desc: 2001. A son's visit home turns into a desperate search for his missing father. A detective uncovers a murder with a stunning revelation about a group of children, and a mother struggles to believe her son could be involved in a vicious crime.

programme.title: Shattered: Requiem for Murder
programme.desc: In 1992, when a woman in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania is attacked, police eye a local family man as the suspect. But one detective thinks everyone's got it all wrong: this attack isn't a one-off - it's the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Kill List
programme.desc: Prison Valley is rocked by the murder of Prisons Chief Tom Clements. The cops think it's part of a wider plot, and they're running out of time to catch the killer.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Cowboys From Hell
programme.desc: When Diana Algar and Jose Molina are found brutally murdered in rural Hollenback Township, Pennsylvania, three letters scrawled across Algar's living room wall become the central clue in a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: Dateline: Manner of Death
programme.desc: It was a mystery from day one: a young father's life cut short. How Matt Podolak died was a curious. The word poison kept coming up. Unsure if it was suicide or murder, Matt's brother embarks on a long quest for the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Manner of Death
programme.desc: It was a mystery from day one: a young father's life cut short. How Matt Podolak died was a curious. The word poison kept coming up. Unsure if it was suicide or murder, Matt's brother embarks on a long quest for the truth.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Secrets in the Cars
programme.desc: After a night out with friends, 20-year-old Jaleayah Davis is found dead in the midst of a horrifying scene. And 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, drives two hours to show her boyfriend a sonogram of the baby, but never makes it home.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: The Heartland Massacre
programme.desc: In the heart of America's devastating Farm Crisis, the largest mass murder in recent Missouri history stuns a small town. An entire family is wiped out. The unlikely suspect is a 14-year-old boy… but the real extent of the horror is even more shocking.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Road Rage
programme.desc: When Ray and Marie Thornton head out for a drive in the country on Easter Sunday, they are nearly chased off the road by a tailgating van. When the Thornton's spot the van's driver changing license plates and dumping a bloody sheet, they call police.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Commanders
programme.desc: This is the story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of the second Iraq conflict.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions

programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: New Chapter, New House
programme.desc: Chip and Jo meet with a client who just purchased a 1950s bungalow hoping to make it her forever home.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Austin Couple Finds Waco Charm
programme.desc: Matt and Samantha Hardy are looking to move from Austin to Waco, Texas, and buy their first house together.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Historic Tudor-Style Home for a New Family
programme.desc: Courtney and Joey Scrivano are ready to upgrade from their modest loft to a house where they can raise their new baby. Built in 1927, their Tudor-style home is outdated and has little functionality.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: New Chapter for Family of Four
programme.desc: The Jacksons need four bedrooms and three bathrooms that, ideally, can be renovated within their budget.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Modern Cabin Makeover
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna team up with their friend Jimmy Don to transform a bland little house into a modern mountain cabin for his son. The project quickly turns into one of the most unique renovations yet with a little help from former first lady Laura Bush.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fruity Favorites
programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples some berry delicious fairground treats in this fruitful episode. Tart, sweet and perfect with breakfast, lunch or dinner, fruit makes everything pop. No forbidden fruits here, just some truly inventive fruit-filled creations.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Sweet 'n' Savory Sensations
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the fairgrounds to sample midway munchies that satisfy every taste bud, from sweet to savory. From a bratwurst topped with sauerkraut and apple pie to garlic enhanced doughnuts.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy
programme.desc: The temperature is rising, and some folks like it really hot! Eddie Jackson shares hot and spicy dishes that give a little sweet, a little savory and a whole lot of spice.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Frankenfoods
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes through a full day of mind-blowing food combinations, from new takes on old favorites to presentations that aren't quite what they appear to be. These pairings keep diners guessing and leave their taste buds begging for more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocolate Lovers Delight

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: North Dakota State Fair/ Prairiefest

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Henny Penny: Straight, No Chaser
programme.desc: The girls are quarantined with first-graders when they all catch the measles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.title: Frasier: The Perfect Guy
programme.desc: The radio station hires a new health expert, who seems perfect in every way. Frasier tries desperately to find Dr. Clint Webber's flaw, while Martin gets thrown out of the only store that carries Eddie's favourite dog food.

programme.title: Frasier: Bad Dog
programme.desc: Much to Frasier's chagrin, Bulldog becomes a hero during an attempted armed robbery.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Gotta Have It
programme.desc: Frasier has trouble accepting that his relationship is built on physical attraction.

programme.title: Frasier: First Date
programme.desc: Niles finally takes the initiative to ask Daphne out and Frasier gets hooked on a 'soap.'

programme.title: Frasier: Roz and the Schnoz
programme.desc: Roz finally meets the parents of her baby's father and notices a family facial trait.

programme.title: Frasier: The Life of the Party
programme.desc: When Frasier and Niles lament about their love life, Martin suggests a singles party. The Crane boys soon fall for the same woman, while Roz's water breaks and she goes into labour.

programme.title: Frasier: Party, Party
programme.desc: Frasier makes an effort to spend time with a charming woman whom he recently met.

programme.title: Frasier: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: When Frasier stands up for himself, his new station manager has a surprising reaction.

programme.title: Reba: The Goodbye Guy
programme.desc: In the wake of Barbra Jean telling the IRS that Reba and Brock owe $75,000 in back taxes, Brock decides to pay off the debt by selling his house and moving to Las Vegas.

programme.title: Reba: The Trouble With Dr. Hunky
programme.desc: Reba goes on a date with Dr. Jack Morgan, who has returned to Houston with the intention of resuming his romance with Reba. Later, a startling admission by Jack has Reba seeking advice from Brock.

programme.title: Reba: Money Blues
programme.desc: When Reba learns that Cheyenne must document all of her purchases, Reba advises Van to treat Cheyenne more as an equal, but Van decides to give Cheyenne an allowance instead. Meanwhile, Jake starts a lucrative business selling soda to his classmates.

programme.title: Reba: Reba the Landlord
programme.desc: In an effort to save Brock and Barbra Jean from losing their home, Reba and Van buy their house and rent it out to them. Not liking this arrangement, Barbra Jean decides to sue Reba after she sprains her ankle in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Reba: Reba's Heart

programme.desc: After a 40-year manhunt, investigators finally find their needle in a DNA haystack and unmask a man who they suspect as California’s most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hiding in Plain Sight Part 2
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Now accused of committing some of California’s most heinous crimes, this man was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets

programme.desc: As the first callout races begin, Chief starts his attempted march towards number one and Murder Nova tries to use the Chase Light rules to his advantage.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Boddies Beyond 1320
programme.desc: Racers at Boddie's Beyond 1320 are racing past the $35,000 finish line, where there's no rubber down at all, and the bets are flying, as it gets crazy at the very end of the track.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: With half the crab boats tied up, Sig devises a plan to save the fishery from destruction. As Bering Sea legend Johnathan Hillstrand returns with the Time Bandit to help, veterans struggle to prove they can work together to defend the American dream.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Harris Legacy
programme.desc: The discovery of mysterious fishing charts on the Cornelia Maria leads co-captains Josh Harris and Casey McManus to Hawaii to learn what Josh's late father, Captain Phil Harris, was attempting to accomplish decades ago.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Josh, Casey and Jeff travel to the southern edge of Kona's fishing grounds a spot Phil Harris frequently explored. Despite the rough waters and unpredictable weather, the trio dives into Kona's shark-infested waters to learn what kept Phil coming back.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Ohana
programme.desc: Josh and his crew get an opportunity to supply ahi and mahi to a local restaurant and hope Phil's notes will lead them to a big payday. It's their first chance to turn a profit but if they want to succeed, they must first learn the Hawaiian way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Cowboys and Pirates
programme.desc: On Hawaii's Big Island, Josh enlists the help of Johnathan Hillstrand to help him dive deeper into the mystery of Phil's charts and gain insight into the time Phil spent in Kona Town.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: All-Nighter
programme.desc: Inspired by Phil's love of history, Josh, Casey and Johnathan Hillstrand brave unknown waters in the dead of night to try their hand at the ancient Hawaiian Ika-Shibi fishing technique.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Legacy Continues
programme.desc: With only two days left before they must head back to Dutch Harbor for King Crab season, Josh and Casey have one last goal to achieve in Hawaii: land a big marlin, the one fish that eluded Phil Harris decades ago.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Return to the Big Island
programme.desc: A year after finding his father's fishing charts, Josh and Casey return to Hawaii to grow their fledgling fishing business. Finding an industry in ruin, they join with business partner, Jeff Silva, to devise a strategy to navigate the waters ahead.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legacy of Phil Harris: Hard Living
programme.desc: The captains and crew recount some of their most harrowing times at sea. A skipper on the Cornelia Marie paid a heavy price for his hard living ways. Captain Johnathan left the Time Bandit for warmer waters.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legacy of Phil Harris: Mission Critical
programme.desc: Phil Harris' critical illness at sea creates a dilemma for his sons. Phil was flown to Anchorage for treatment. One son stayed by his side, while his son, Josh, stayed with the boat to meet his crab quota -- then has to decide if and when to abandon ship.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legacy of Phil Harris: Grind it Out

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legacy of Phil Harris: Epic Storm

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Forensic Science
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the scary truth behind unreliable methods used as evidence in criminal cases. He exposes the flaws of fingerprinting, hair strand matches, and bite mark analysis, which often send innocent people to jail.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Hygiene
programme.desc: Adam reveals that the term 'halitosis' was popularized in a 1920s ad campaign that used cruel ads to make people insecure about their breath, and explains why running water is one of the greatest miracles of the modern age.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Voting
programme.desc: Adam explores the twisted history of the Electoral College, explaining that the Founding Fathers did not want most Americans to vote. He also takes a stab at fixing a political system that seems rigged against true democracy.

programme.desc: Carrie wonders why her guy won't hit the sheets; Miranda discovers she has an STD.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Drama Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous about meeting Aidan's family; Charlotte meets a doctor.

programme.title: Botched: Nothing Butt Trouble
programme.desc: A young woman visits the doctors and multiple silicone removal surgeries have left her with a distorted derriere, while a leggy painter needs her nose fixed to help lift her mother's guilty conscience.

programme.title: Botched: Baby Got Boobs
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow has a lot to handle as he hopes to help a cancer survivor reconstruct her breasts and abdomen. A psychic who looks to remove her implants. The doctors try to reason with someone who could potentially become a plastic surgery addict.

programme.title: Botched: Lumpy Lipo and Slippy Nippy
programme.desc: A woman with a 'side nipple' issue visits the doctors. A car accident leaves another woman's face disfigured. A previous patient comes back to the doctors, hoping to look more like a celebrity idol.

programme.title: Botched: 2,000CCs and Counting
programme.desc: A frightening surgical mishap in Colombia leaves a woman with franken-tits and the doctors salvage a man's dog bitten nose. While an Australian woman has a severe case of boob greed.

programme.title: Botched: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a patient who's had an implant removed three times, leaving her with one breast. Dr. Nassif assists a patient who received a surprise nose job in Peru. A UK deejay and firebreather hopes for heel implants to increase their height.

programme.title: Botched: Magical Mystery Breasts
programme.desc: A rare inflammatory disease brings a woman to the doctors for advice. A patient longs for the abs he can't seem to naturally acquire. An overseas client hopes for a boob job, having survived a near-death experience in the operating room.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Shock And Awe
programme.desc: How boundary-pushing TV not only shocks and disgusts, with shows like 'Bad Girls Club' and 'Fear Factor', but also informs, with shows like 'Botched', and celebrates previously marginalized groups with shows like 'I Am Jazz' and 'RuPaul's Drag Race'.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Botched: Butchered Breasts and Nasal Nightmares
programme.desc: Mexican top model Carmen Campuzano visits the doctors in hopes of restoring her nose and career, while a discharged soldier wants to mend her butchered breasts to fit in as a civilian.

programme.title: Botched: Welcome to Jurassic Schnoz
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps an eating disorder survivor feel beautiful in her own skin by downsizing her breasts, while Dr. Nassif sends a 'dinosaur' nose back to the Jurassic era.

programme.title: Botched: Viva Las Vegas Boobs
programme.desc: A woman visits the doctors to fix her scarred stomach and popped implant. Then, a police officer wants her nose fixed so she can look like her twin again.

programme.title: Botched: A Revision Runs Through It
programme.desc: On the road in Montana, the doctors take a man-cation fly fishing and also check in on a woman who went headfirst into a chain link fence in a horrific motorcycle accident. Plus, a woman recovering from a 'mommy breakover' urgently needs help.

programme.title: Botched: Cougars and Cobras and Boobs ... Oh My!
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif wrangles a cougar's cobra neck while Dr. Dubrow helps a desperate patient downsize her triple D's. Later, he puts Dr. Nassif under the knife.

programme.desc: Three pairs of twins team up to show that two head chefs are better than one at winning up to $20,000 in Flavortown!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: First Round Redemption
programme.desc: Four GGG competitors who previously checked out early return to Flavortown to try their luck again. In each round, Guy Fieri hits them with his Wheel of Redemption, which features the games that the chefs went out on.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: GGG at Home
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri send mystery ingredients to their favourite chefs, who have to use them in burgers and seafood dinners made in their own kitchens. Guy and Hunter play some of Flavortown's classic games to add to the chefs' culinary difficulties.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Andy's Vacation
programme.desc: A prisoner escapes when Andy leaves Barney and Gomer in charge of the jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Andy Saves Gomer
programme.desc: Gomer makes a pest of himself after Andy wakes him to put out a minor fire.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Bargain Day
programme.desc: Aunt Bee saves money by buying a side of beef only to have her freezer conk out on her.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Divorce Mountain Style
programme.desc: A mountain-style divorce ritual is made even worse by Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: A Deal Is a Deal
programme.desc: Barney and Gomer try to help Opie when he gets caught in a phony scheme to sell salve.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show: Fun Girls
programme.desc: Two blonde women visit the sheriff's office and Andy drives them home.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Dancing With Debra
programme.desc: After Debra and Robert go out dancing, they become infatuated with their new hobby.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Robert Moves Back
programme.desc: Ray grudgingly offers up his basement office when Robert and Amy get back together.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: How They Met
programme.desc: A flashback to the first time Ray and Debra laid eyes on each other, and their first kiss.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Boob Job
programme.desc: Debra is upset by Ray's giddy reaction to her friend's recently acquired breasts.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Can Opener
programme.desc: Everyone takes sides when Ray and Debra have a senseless argument over a new can opener.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: You Bet
programme.desc: When Frank starts walking around in a jovial mood, everyone questions the change in him.

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Baker's Doesn't
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie run into Father McDaniel at the movies they feel guilty that they haven't been to church in some time and sign up to help out during the busy holiday season. Meanwhile, Arthur and Spence try to write a Christmas carol.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gambling N'Diction
programme.desc: When Doug's mother beats him and the guys in a friendly game of poker, Doug sees an opportunity to capitalize on her poker skills and help him win a high stakes poker tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Mama Drama
programme.desc: Adam's desire to be the lead in the school musical "Jesus Christ Superstar" goes unfulfilled when he's cast in something other than the leading role. Insistent that her son is a star, Beverly casts Adam in a rival show, but he becomes too self-obsessed.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Facts of Bleeping Life
programme.desc: With Prince Charles and Lady Di's wedding approaching, Beverly gets the idea for her and Murray to renew their vows. But with Murray's complete lack of interest, will Beverly lose her chance at a second wedding?

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Pilot
programme.desc: Christine's 8-year-old son, Ritchie has been accepted into a posh private school where Christine encounters two snooty class moms, Marly and Lindsay, who seem unable to grasp the concept that Christine actually works.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Supertramp
programme.desc: When Christine learns that Richard and new Christine are enjoying an intimate relationship, she becomes determined to make her own conquests. After several failed attempts to meet eligible men, she finally runs into a guy named Stan at the grocery store.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Open Water
programme.desc: When Christine learns that her close friends, Barb and Pete, are responsible for introducing Richard to his new girlfriend named Christine, she allows them to set her up on a blind date of her own. Meanwhile, Matthew takes Ritchie to swimming lessons.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: One Toe Over the Line, Sweet Jesus
programme.desc: Richard plays the part of the jealous ex-husband when he learns that Christine is enjoying her fifth date with a new beau, Burton. He even goes as far as to sabotage the happy couple's goodnight kiss and intentionally insults Burton.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bird and the Bees

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Family First
programme.desc: Barn construction is all hands-on deck, but the family confronts Bam when he chooses to pay more attention to his own projects.
