programme.desc: Mickey and his friends travel to the faraway Desert to get sand for the Clubhouse Sandbox.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super Goof's Super Puzzle
programme.desc: In order to help his friends solve a puzzle, Goofy uses his alter-ego 'Super Goof'.

programme.title: Bluey: See Saw/ Movies/ Grandad
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo go on an adventure with Grandad!

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: The Ten Gallon Trophy/ Plane Crazy
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Small Wonder/ Dino Check-up Hiccup
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Missing Space Rock / Flying Factory Out of Control
programme.desc: Newton thinks Owlette stole a precious asteroid – but she’s been framed by Romeo. Romeo needs the PJs' help bringing his Flying Factory under control, but they don't trust him.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy and the Shrinker/ Owlette and the Moonball
programme.desc: Romeo and Night Ninja team up to shrink the PJ Masks with Romeo’s shrinker invention. Luna Girl creates a giant moonball and hides all the toys she’s stolen inside.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Bluey: Dunny/ Duck Cake/ Handstand
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake. Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Kirby's Derby/ Ticklish Truck
programme.desc: It's the day of the big Derby race in the McStuffins backyard and all of the toys are assembled. After helping the dragons invade Pillow Fort McStuffins, Lenny can't stop giggling.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Baby McStuffins/ Selfless Snowman
programme.desc: Mom and Dad announce that they are adopting a baby and give Doc a new doll to practice her babysitting skills. Doc and the toys hold a stuffing drive for a toy in need of a rare 'cotton ball white' fluff.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library! / ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Desert Pups/ Okavango Odyssey
programme.desc: Bob gets a flat tire on a road trip with the Pugs; The Pugs look for Bob's Moms' lost locket.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: Helicopter/ Octopus/ Baby Race
programme.desc: Bluey turns a tree stump into a game of Helicopter. Chloe tries to teach her dad to play Bluey's game. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Toy/ Bloodlines
programme.desc: A favourite toy of Theodore's is lost on a rafting trip but then mysteriously shows up at the house. Alvin wants Dave to take a DNA test to see if he's a famous explorer or king, but maybe it's a person much scarier.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Temporary Mom/ Tee Fore Two
programme.desc: When the boys get stuck with Miss Miller as a babysitter, they each take a crack at finding a replacement. Alvin volunteers to caddy a charity golf tournament and surprisingly gets paired up with Miss Smith.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Brittany the Body Snatcher/ Agent Smith
programme.desc: When Alvin notices Brittany being nice to him he's sure an alien has taken over her body. In order to earn a job on the school newspaper, Alvin helps Simon uncover the biggest story the school's ever seen.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk Man/ Ride Along
programme.desc: Simon creates a Super Hero costume for a convention he's attending. When Alvin's bicycle is stolen, he joins forces with Officer Dangus to solve the case.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Mama Drama/ Ballet Boys
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting isn't easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment.When Alvin's soccer team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Oh Brother!/ What's the Difference?
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a perfect older brother, but his brother is so perfect that he is boring Timmy to tears; Timmy wishes everything in school was mixed up like a "find it" puzzle book.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Fun/ Smart Attack
programme.desc: Remy Buxaplenty has come home from military school for spring break. All he can talk about is how great his new school is, making Timmy and friends jealous; Dad keeps trying to help Timmy with his homework, but he's not the brightest dad.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Snack Pact/ The Horror-Scope
programme.desc: The family finds a tamale cart and tries to keep it secret from Abuela. And, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction until it comes true.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Trend Game/ This Bird Has Flown
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

programme.title: The Loud House: Teacher's Union/ Head Poet's Anxiety
programme.desc: To try and make gym class better, Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up. Luan mentors Lucy teaching her how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House: Pasture Bedtime/ Shop Girl
programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Net Gains/ Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Lynn desperately wants to win a basketball championship but gets drafted onto a terrible team. Mom and Dad are sick of waiting in the long bathroom line so they decide to build a secret bathroom.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Brendar the Barbarian
programme.desc: Brendar is expelled from the Royal Order of Warrior Princesses, and is left as a 'feared and revered' Barbarian.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Treats!/ For Here or to Go
programme.desc: Gary goes crazy over the new snail treats SpongeBob brought home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: It's Pony: Pet Pony/ Dog Day
programme.desc: When pets are banned from the building, Annie and Pony have to convince the landlord to reconsider. When the dog from next door, Pony's sworn enemy, comes to stay with them, Annie needs to find a way to make them get along.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: Unblocking Bernie/ Photo Finished
programme.desc: A boy controls a portal with the help of his friends and a monster.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sleepy Time/ Suds
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his friends' dreams; Bob musters the courage to visit the doctor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Bob and Pat convince Mr. Krabs to play Treasure Hunt; Bob hops on the wrong bus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Patrick takes SpongeBob on as his role model; SpongeBob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe Is Untied/ Something Smells
programme.desc: Squid is put in charge of getting Pat a new pair of shoes; Bob eats sea-onion ice cream.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SB-129/ Karate Choppers
programme.desc: Squidward ends up in a freezer; Bob and Sandy's incessant karate sparring wreaks havoc.

programme.title: The Loud House: Driving Miss Hazy/ No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their babysitter.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Sweet Spot/ A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to obtain a prime seat for the family's roadtrip. Lincoln acts more mature in order to eat at the adult table.

programme.title: The Loud House: Intern for the Worse/ The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: The Loud House: Heavy Meddle/ Making the Case
programme.desc: After being picked on, Lincoln regrets telling his sisters to stay out of his business. When a video contest opens at school, Lincoln decides to record his sisters embarrassing themselves.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim/ Changing the Baby
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gullible Pants/ Overbooked
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab for 15 minutes. SpongeBob triple-books his schedule, and does his best to be at all three events at the same time.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: That Sinking Feeling/ Karate Star
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Whisperer/ Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Alvin dresses Theodore up like a baby in order to impress the girl of his dreams. While attempting to make a special present for Dave, Alvin creates a snowball effect of chaos.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Cat Sitter/ Addicted
programme.desc: Theodore gets stuck taking care of Miss Croner's cats during the week. Dave wants the boys to focus only on school. The Chipettes challenge the Chipmunks to go three hours without their favorite things.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Wild Weekend/ For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before an academic contest.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Let Them Eat Crumbs/ Who Ghosts There
programme.desc: Eleanor has prepared a cake for a Bake-Off. But Brittany and Alvin come home and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Later, worried that Dave will move the family to his dream house, the boys make the house seem haunted.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Something's Fishy/ Presto Chang-O
programme.desc: Timmy is at the beach and he's bored silly. Wanting to go diving, he wishes to become a fish; Timmy hasn't studied for a test in Mr. Crocker's class so he wishes for a device that allows him to change places with anyone who comes in contact with it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Good Ol' Days/ Future Lost
programme.desc: Timmy gets babysat by Dad's dad; Timmy and Dad come upon Dad's favourite childhood book.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Timmy the Barbarian/ No Substitute for Crazy
programme.desc: Jorgen Von Strangle tells the very macho story of muscular warrior Timmy the Barbarian.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mission Responsible/ Hair-I-Cane
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted, so Timmy volunteers to baby-sit and give them a night out. Timmy's tired of getting really bad haircuts from Dad.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: Danger Force: Crush
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: An Udder Mess/ Teacher's Fret
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wins two tickets to Dairyland – but has to choose between her besties Sid and Lincoln for the day. / When Ronnie Anne finds out her dad is dating her teacher, she teams with Sid to break them up ASAP.

programme.title: The Loud House: Teacher's Union/ Head Poet's Anxiety
programme.desc: To try and make gym class better, Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up. Luan mentors Lucy teaching her how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Out of Darkness
programme.desc: Hera and Sabine take the Phantom to an abandoned asteroid base for resupply but become stranded there since the boys neglected to properly prepare the shuttle. Ravenous creatures attack while the Ghost crew scrambles to extract them.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Empire Day
programme.desc: On Empire Day, a government-mandated celebration of the founding of the Empire, an old friend of Ezra's parents, Tseebo, seeks help from the crew to escape off world with important Imperial information.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Shut-In!
programme.desc: In this special extended episode, Anne and the Plantars protect themselves from the dangers of the annual Blue Moon by locking themselves in the house and entertaining each other with the scariest stories they can think of.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Spy Fly
programme.desc: Leo turns to Bree for help after he mistakenly unleashes a swarm of robotic flies on the school. Adam and Chase turn their class assignment into a destructive competition.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Missin' the Mission
programme.desc: Leo finally goes a mission with Davenport and Eddy in an attempt to stop an underground gas leak. Adam, Bree and Chase struggle to escape from Principal Perry's detention lockdown.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Speed Trapped
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase sneak out to meet Marcus in Davenport's new self-driving sports car.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Fish You Were Here
programme.desc: Bailey is upset when she is the only one of her classmates not invited to a birthday party.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please
programme.desc: Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Party Hearty
programme.desc: Chance tries to figure out why he's the only one of his friends invited to party, while the gang pulls off a prank that makes Herman's creepy life-size doll appear to come to life just in time to scare a babysitter.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome to the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Blessious This Messious
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Der Kinderlumper/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Candace is chosen to be Rutabega princess and gets to start the Running of the Chinchillas.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: A spy video game turns dangerously real as Launchpad and Dewey must stop F.O.W.L. agent Steelbeak’s plan to destroy Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald and Louie trick Daisy the no-nonsense planner, so the Three Caballeros can play at a high-class party.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!
programme.desc: Dewey must embrace his inner heel to beat the beloved Viking wrestling champ Jormungandr in a battle royale for the fate of the Earth.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Phantom and the Sorceress!
programme.desc: When a mysterious magic thief arrives in Duckburg, Lena must confront her past and team with her treacherous aunt, Magica.

programme.title: DuckTales: They Put a Moonlander on the Earth!
programme.desc: Webby sets out to prove to a homesick Penumbra that Earth can be a lot of fun by riding Glomgold's newest gift to Duckburg, the suspicious Flintferris Glomwheel.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Forbidden Fountain of the Foreverglades!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Goldie O'Gilt are turned into teenagers as they race Rockerduck to the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: DuckTales: Let's Get Dangerous! Part II: The St. Canardian Guardian!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Let's Get Dangerous! Part II: The St. Canardian Guardian!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: The Bitter Man and the Sea
programme.desc: Mike is forced to uninvite Carl to his anniversary cruise after Carl's nasty break-up with Victoria.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Cops on the Rocks
programme.desc: Mike and Carl go to couples counselling to try and reconcile their partnership. Also, Molly decides to do a promotional radio interview on her own after Peggy decides not to participate.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Moon Over Kenya
programme.desc: When a rising young star on the pro fishing circuit has dinner at the Baxters' and the conversation turns to travelling the world for work, Vanessa wonders if Mike is feeling tied down now that he spends more time at home.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Tree of Strife
programme.desc: When an overzealous Mandy gets the chance to meet her idol, Kim Kardashian, things don't go exactly as planned, but the outcome is better than she could have ever imagined. Mike doesn't want 'The Man' ordering him to cut down a damaged tree.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Peer-ent Trap
programme.desc: Teenager Zoey goes through a mini-rebellion phase by pushing boundaries and acting out. Dre wants to lay down the law while Bow insists on a softer approach like her mom did with her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Wilds of Valley Glen
programme.desc: Dre must take Jack and Diane on a mandatory camping trip for school and hatches a plan for them to escape to a fancy hotel for some pampering.

programme.title: DC's Legends of Tomorrow: Ground Control to Sara Lance
programme.desc: Rory and Behrad follow a lead on who can help them find Sara, who's been taken by Aliens, while Constantine tries to work his magic. Sara does all she can to try to escape but is shocked to learn who one of her kidnappers is.

programme.title: Batwoman: Initiate Self-Destruct
programme.desc: A decision could expose Ryan as Batwoman. Black Mask's plans for Kate Kane begin to unfold. Alice is reunited with someone from her past, and Sophie must decide where her loyalty lies.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Little Kicks
programme.desc: Jerry is forced into doing an illegal activity; George cultivates a bad boy image.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Package
programme.desc: Kramer tries to scam the United States Postal Service to get Jerry a refund for a stereo.

programme.title: Mom: Broken Dreams and Blocked Arteries
programme.desc: Christy is caught in the middle when tensions rise between Bonnie and Alvin. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Violet is apprehensive about going to her senior prom.

programme.title: Mom: Smokey Taylor and a Deathbed Confession
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie help Violet through labour. Meanwhile, Christy is convinced that Bonnie still has feelings for Alvin.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Sax Problem
programme.desc: When Earl is not invited to play with his old jazz band at their reunion show, Max and the diner gang join forces in order to get him back on stage.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the No New Friends
programme.desc: When Max reconnects with an old friend, Caroline's jealousy inspires her to try to make some new friends of her own.

programme.title: Major Crimes: N.S.F.W.
programme.desc: The murder of a Sex Crimes detective leads Major Crimes into the world of barely legal porn, where they find rampant drug use and questionable ethics. Meanwhile, Rusty's biological mother, Sharon Beck returns with some surprising news.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk and the Girl Who Cried Wolf
programme.desc: The shoe is on the other foot when inexplicable things put Sharona's sanity to the test.

programme.desc: Years ago, a young Georgia woman got pregnant so that she and her then boyfriend could legally marry, but now 28 years later she's in court to find out if her ex-husband or one of her lovers is her daughter's biological father.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Mariza wants Lena to pay for property she damaged and stole, but Lena says Mariza and her other tenants are responsible for the damage, and that her stolen items were misplaced.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her ex-boyfriend for damaged property and lost wages, but he says while he was incarcerated, she was cheating on him, even after her assurances she was being faithful.

programme.desc: Segments include 'Terrible Tub ' and 'Not Tightening Things Up.'

programme.desc: A woman claims she got an infection from a cosmetic procedure; an artist claims his exhibit sales suffered due to a poor location.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Kenneth says Margaret kicked him out of her home and refused to let him collect his belongings. Margaret insists that she never stopped him from picking up his stuff and he is suing her to discredit her name and to be vindictive after a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Update: The Disappearance of Relisha Rudd
programme.desc: The 2014 disappearance of 8-year-old Relisha Rudd shocked a Washington D.C. community and the story continues to make headlines. Relisha’s mother, Shamika, is joining the show virtually to share updates and answer questions.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: A Blonde Bombshell
programme.desc: Salena thinks her boyfriend Keith is cheating with Danica again. Briana was confronted by Erica about hooking up with her boyfriend James but Briana isn't who Erica needs to worry about. Ky wants to be honest with Keera about his identity.

programme.title: Maury: Is This Child I Babysat Really My Man's Love Child?
programme.desc: Nae Nae's boyfriend may be the father of her former neighbour Monay's baby. Kala says Jeffrey is her daughter's father, but Jeffrey and his mom say an infection made him sterile. Kandice suspects Nick is cheating.
